description: HFD-A vs HFD-B vs HFD-C disambiguation via 3-step (Llama stride=1 BLOCKED, DeepSeek 5th bb, BBA 7-axis correlation)

step1_llama_stride1.reason: meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B is gated=manual; HF account dancinlife not authorized (cross-validates axis 105 finding)
step1_llama_stride1.deferred_to: post HF license accept (~1-2 business days)
step1_llama_stride1.alternative_evidence: Step 2 (DeepSeek 5th bb decoupling reappearance) substitutes for HFD-C artifact ruling-out

caveats: raw#10 honest: Step 1 (Llama stride=1) BLOCKED by HF gated access. HFD-C artifact only partially ruled out via Step 2 (different architecture reappearance).

DeepSeek used residual-passthrough ablation hook (v3-style) — not the original anima_cmt.hexa zero-output hook (which produced degenerate rel=1.0). Helper modification required ω-cycle iter 3 (torch upgrade 2.4→2.6, torchvision 0.19→0.21, hook semantics fix).
5-bb is still small. Pearson r over n=4 backbones has wide CI; |r|=0.7 / 0.3 thresholds are heuristic, not statistical.
Family list (Hexad/Law/Phi/SelfRef) and prompts frozen v10. Decoupling could be prompt-conditional rather than backbone-intrinsic.
DeepSeek architecture is Llama-arch (LlamaForCausalLM); 5th bb does not test architecture-confound — Yi-9B / Falcon-mamba / Qwen2.5 needed for true cross-arch.
HFD-C ARTIFACT residual: Llama stride=1 still required to fully eliminate grid sampling artifact; deferred verdict stands.
